text: People are changing the world with AI. From drug discovery to chat bots to autonomous machines and beyond. To achieve these breakthroughs, they need more than just AI expertise and development skills. They need an AI factory. A purpose-built AI engine that's always available and can help them build larger, more useful AIs faster. Nvidia's AI factory, EOS, is the ninth fastest supercomputer in the world on the top 500 list. An extremely large-scale Nvidia DGX super pod, EOS is where Nvidia developers create their leading edge AI innovations. EOS leverages a full stack architecture consisting of NVIDIA accelerated infrastructure, NVIDIA networking, and NVIDIA AI software in a design that's purpose-built for AI. The Nvidia DGX H100 systems in EOS, which feature eight Nvidia H100 tensor core GPUs each and provide unprecedented performance individually, are linked together with Nvidia Infiniban and paired with high performance storage to create a massive system capable of training generative AI projects at astonishing speeds. By creating an AI factory like EOS, enterprises can take on their most demanding projects and achieve their AI aspirations today and into the future. [Music]

title: Eos: The AI Factory Powering NVIDIA AI’s Breakthroughs
